_comment: Tests Geelong Osteopaths' single OSTEOPATHY BRANCH: the mandatory new/existing patient gate question, then silent confirm_service routing to the new-patient path (213916) or the existing-patient path (213928) based on the caller's answer.

scenarios.name: Osteopathy booking request — must ask new/existing gate before routing

history.content: Hi, I'd like to book an osteopathy appointment.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent asks a new/existing patient gate question (e.g. 'Have you had osteo with us before?' or equivalent) as a spoken-only turn with no tool call. FAIL if agent calls confirm_service without asking the gate question first.

scenarios.name: Existing patient — affirmative gate answer routes to Return Osteopathic Consultation

history.content: Hi, I'd like to book an osteopathy appointment.
Have you had osteo with us before?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls universal_router intent='confirm_service' silently (zero spoken output) with payload appointment_type_id='213928', appointment_type='Return Osteopathic Consultation', patient_status='existing'. FAIL if agent asks another question, speaks any text before the tool call, or uses appointment_type_id='213916'.

scenarios.name: New patient — negative gate answer routes to New Patient/Initial Consultation

history.content: Hi, I'd like to book an osteopathy appointment.
Is this your first time here for osteopathy?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls universal_router intent='confirm_service' silently (zero spoken output) with payload appointment_type_id='213916', appointment_type='New Patient/Initial Consultation', patient_status='new'. FAIL if agent asks another question, speaks any text before the tool call, or uses appointment_type_id='213928'.
